subcodes.first_line: Unto every eye we announce the glad-tidings: behold ye the signs of the Lord of the world and its Possessor [3.5s]... ...Peerless is this Day, for it is as the eye to past ages and centuries, and as a light unto the darkness of the times.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابصار را خبر مینمائیم و بشارت میدهیم خود را از مشاهده آثار مقصود عالم و مالک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @petitions to authorities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels
